claims.subject: Aisha Yusof
claims.evidence: i run the sea sales floor in singapore

claims.subject: Aisha Yusof
claims.evidence: monday morning forecast call with sofia and the other regional leads, then i do one to one with each rep across monday and tuesday, midweek is usually customer escalations or joining calls when a rep asks for help on a bigger deal, friday is the pipeline review with the whole team where we go deal by deal and stress test what's in commit and best case
claims.object_value: Monday forecast call with Sofia and regional leads; 1:1s with reps Mon-Tue; midweek customer escalations/deal support; Friday whole-team pipeline review (deal-by-deal commit and best case)

claims.subject: HelixPay SEA Q1
claims.evidence: enterprise carried us, marcus had two big closes in march that pulled us out of the hole
claims.object_value: Enterprise segment carried SEA; Marcus closed two large deals in March

claims.subject: HelixPay SEA Q1 SMB
claims.evidence: smb was softer than i wanted but not catastrophic
claims.object_value: softer than target but not catastrophic

claims.subject: Aisha Yusof
claims.evidence: i'm the person who looks at the pipeline every monday and tells sofia what i think we land
claims.object_value: Weekly Monday pipeline review and forecast communicated to Sofia

claims.subject: Aisha Yusof
claims.evidence: i've started telling reps unless there's a written next step from the merchant treat it as pipeline not commit
claims.object_value: Requires written next step from merchant to classify deal as commit rather than pipeline

claims.subject: outbound_80_calls_target
claims.evidence: i don't think it's the right metric anymore. the funnel has shifted, the leads coming in are warmer on the inbound side and colder on the outbound list and eighty dials a day is a number from when the lists were better
claims.object_value: Aisha believes the 80-calls-per-day target is outdated given funnel shift toward warmer inbound and colder outbound leads

claims.subject: outbound_80_calls_target
claims.evidence: i've flagged it to sofia twice. she agrees in principle but we haven't changed it
claims.object_value: Flagged to Sofia twice; Sofia agrees in principle but target has not been changed

claims.subject: CRM migration
claims.evidence: the pipeline migrated, the deal stages are mapped, the dashboards work for what i need
claims.object_value: Pipeline migrated, deal stages mapped, dashboards functional

claims.subject: CRM migration
claims.evidence: eighty percent of what we do day to day works

claims.subject: CRM migration
claims.evidence: it was rushed. we got two sessions and a recording and then we were live. some of the reps still don't know where to find the deal history filter and they ask me. that should have been a week of proper enablement not two sessions
claims.object_value: Training was rushed; reps still lack knowledge of deal history filter; Aisha recommends a week of proper enablement

claims.subject: Aisha Yusof
claims.evidence: probably more time than i'd like in hubspot cleaning up records that should not need cleaning
claims.object_value: Excessive time spent cleaning HubSpot records
